'''√f-j-h''' ('''kafajah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maa|maa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maa|maa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √f-j-h
|-
! Lemma
| kafajah
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thifajah || jifajah || shifajah || kifajah
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthufajah || jujufajah || shushufajah || kukufajah
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thufajah || jufajah || shufajah || kufajah
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thufajah || jufajah || shufajah || kufajah
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thefajah || jefajah || shefajah || kefajah
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothofajah || jojofajah || shoshofajah || kokofajah
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thofajah || jofajah || shofajah || kofajah
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thofajah || jofajah || shofajah || kofajah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fajah || fajah || fajah || fajah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fajah || fajah || fajah || fajah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fajah || fajah || fajah || fajah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fajah || fajah || fajah || fajah
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæfajah || jæfajah || shæfajah || kæfajah
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathafajah || jajafajah || shashafajah || kakafajah
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thafajah || jafajah || shafajah || kafajah
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thafajah || jafajah || shafajah || kafajah
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shafajah
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshafajah
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishafajah
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shafajahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshafajahnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishafajahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shafajahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshafajahnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishafajahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shafajahro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshafajahnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishafajahro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shafajahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshafajahnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishafajahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shafajahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshafajahnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishafajahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shafajahng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshafajahnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishafajahng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shafajahya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshafajahnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishafajahya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shafajahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshafajahnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishafajahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shafajahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshafajahnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishafajahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shafajahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafajahnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafajahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shafajahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshafajahnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafajahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shafajahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshafajahnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishafajahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shafajahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafajahnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafajahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shafajahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshafajahnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafajahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shafajahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshafajahnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishafajahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shafajahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshafajahnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishafajahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shafajahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshafajahnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafajahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shafajahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshafajahnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishafajahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shafajahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshafajahnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishafajahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shafajahmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafajahnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafajahmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
